title: GL2 7NQ, Urbaser Environmental Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/CP3535CK/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Urbaser Environmental Limited   Installation name: Javelin Park Energy Recovery Facility   Permit number: EPR/CP3535CK/V006   "
